subtasks.description: Query MongoDB to retrieve all active billing contracts with contracted annual value and key identifiers (contract ID, vendor, status, contracted annual value)
Query SQL warehouse to sum actual invoices issued in 2024 by contract ID, returning contract ID and total 2024 invoice amount

Reconcile contracted annual values from MongoDB against 2024 actual invoices from SQL. Calculate variance percentage for each contract. Flag contracts with >10% absolute variance (over or under billing). Return reconciliation report with contract ID, vendor, contracted value, actual 2024 invoices, variance amount, variance percentage, and variance flag.

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks needed: (1) Retrieve active contracts from MongoDB (small tier—straightforward collection query with basic filtering), (2) Sum 2024 invoices from SQL (small tier—single aggregate query), (3) Reconcile and flag variance (mid tier—cross-source reconciliation with variance calculation and classification logic). The variance flagging is classification/decision logic, which is part of cross_recon's scope; no separate policy_action needed since this is a data variance check, not a governance policy evaluation.

output.sql: SELECT contract_id, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_2024_invoice_amount FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND invoice_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY contract_id

reconciled.reconciliation_logic: LEFT JOIN on contract_id with MongoDB as primary
reconciled.note: Every active contract from MongoDB appears in output. SQL amounts default to 0/null if contract has no 2024 invoices. Variance calculated as (contracted_value - actual_invoices). Negative variance = over-billing, positive = under-billing.

output.execution_note: Ready to process. Awaiting MongoDB contract documents and SQL invoice aggregation results to populate reconciliation matrix.
